title: Cloud Backups
subtitle: Send encrypted backups of your flights, aircraft, licenses and credentials to a cloud destination on a schedule.
disabled: Cloud backups are not enabled on this server. Ask your administrator to set BACKUP_CREDENTIALS_KEY.
deleteConfirm: Delete "{{name}}" and its run history? This cannot be undone.

error.title: Failed to load backup destinations
error.message: An error occurred while loading your backup destinations. Please try again.

form.credentialsHint: Stored encrypted at rest. Credentials are never returned by the API.
form.retentionHint: 0 keeps all backups. Older backups are deleted from the destination after each successful run.
form.noProviders: No backup providers are available on this server.

runs.skippedTooltip: Nothing changed since the last successful backup, so no new file was uploaded.
runs.skippedNote: Runs are marked Skipped when your data is unchanged since the last successful backup. Nothing is uploaded and your retention slots are preserved. As soon as you add or edit a flight, aircraft, licence or credential, the next run will upload again.
